title: Mcheli-O-Ext
description: Experience next level realistic tanks, planes, ships, helicopters, and turrets with Mcheli Overdrive for 1.12.2. Special thanks to Murachiki27 for porting the main mcheli mod!
body:
Welcome to the next evolution of Minecraft Military Technology with Mcheli Overdrive for 1.12.2! While this version departs from some of the realistic features found in the 1.7.10 version, it introduces exciting new audio enhancements and maintains its commitment to an immersive experience.

In the latest 1.12 version of Mcheli Overdrive, prepare to elevate your Minecraft experience to new heights with an array of cutting-edge aircraft, including the formidable B-2A Spirit! Engage in thrilling aerial combat with iconic planes like the P-51 and F-16, or rain destruction upon your adversaries from the skies with ground-attack aircraft such as the A-10 Warthog. If ground warfare is more your style, jump into battle-tested tanks like the M1A2 Abrams or versatile APCs like the M2 Bradley, leading the charge and demolishing enemy defenses.

Furthermore, Mcheli Overdrive introduces a comprehensive rebalancing of penetration and damage statistics, meticulously aligned with reputable sources such as War Thunder and Wikipedia. This ensures a heightened level of authenticity and strategic depth in your encounters. Now, each vehicle's performance reflects real-world characteristics, providing a more immersive and challenging combat environment. Whether you're soaring through the air or navigating the rugged terrain, the precision of these rebalanced statistics adds an extra layer of tactical complexity to your Mcheli Overdrive experience.

However, it's important to note that the 1.12 version of Mcheli Overdrive, developed by Murachiki27, diverges from its predecessors by not incorporating Hbm's Nuclear Tech and the Realistic Fluids features. Despite these differences, Mcheli Overdrive still promises an exhilarating experience with its diverse range of aircraft and ground vehicles.

While the 1.12 version may not include the Hbm or Realistic Fluids features due to its closed-source nature, Mcheli Overdrive compensates as always with improved vehicle handling, realistic ground and air vehicle combat, and overhauled audio, ensuring a smoother and more responsive gameplay experience. The skies are yours to conquer, and the ground beneath your treads awaits your dominance. Take command, engage in epic battles, and immerse yourself in a Minecraft world that feels more alive and immersive than ever before.

For more information please go to the official Mcheli Extends twitter page found [here](https://twitter.com/mcheliext).
Special credit to the author [Murachiki27](https://twitter.com/Murachiki27).
